title: Selectively encrypting content for distribution from a receiver device to a companion device
abstract: Embodiments include systems and methods for selectively encrypting content for distribution from a receiver device to a companion device. A device processor of the receiving device may receive content, and may determine whether the content is encrypted. The device processor may determine the capabilities of the companion device in response to determining that the content is not encrypted. The device processor may encrypt the content in response to determine that the capabilities of the companion device meet a threshold. The device processor may then send the encrypted content to the companion device.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A method for selectively encrypting content for distribution from a receiver device to a companion device, comprising: determining whether content received by the receiver device is encrypted; determining whether capabilities of the companion device meet a threshold in response to determining that the content is not encrypted; encrypting the content in response to determining that the capabilities of the companion device meet the threshold; and sending the encrypted content to the companion device. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein encrypting the content comprises encrypting the content using a content-layer encryption scheme. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein determining whether content received by the receiver device is encrypted comprises: determining whether out-of-band signaling regarding the content is received; and determining whether the out-of-band signaling indicates that the content is encrypted in response to determining that out-of-band signaling is received. 4. The method of claim 3, further comprising: sending the content to the companion device in response to determining that the out-of-band signaling indicates the content is encrypted. 5. The method of claim 3, further comprising: delaying transmission of the content to the companion device in response to determining that the out-of-band signaling indicates the content is not encrypted; and inspecting the content for encryption. 6. The method of claim 5, further comprising: determining based on inspecting the content whether the content is encrypted; and sending the content to the companion device in response to determining that the content is encrypted. 7. The method of claim 1, wherein determining whether capabilities of the companion device meet a threshold comprises determining whether capabilities of the companion device to prevent redistribution of the content meet the threshold. 8. The method of claim 7, further comprising: preventing access by the companion device to the content in response to determining that the capabilities of the companion device to prevent redistribution of the content do not meet the threshold. 9. A receiver device, comprising: a memory; a network interface configured to receive content from a communication network; a communication interface configured to communicate with a companion device; and a processor coupled to the memory, the network interface and the communication interface, and configured with processor executable instructions to perform operations comprising: determining whether content received by the receiver device is encrypted; determining whether capabilities of the companion device meet a threshold in response to determining that the content is not encrypted; 

 encrypting the content in response to determining that the capabilities of the companion device meet the threshold; and sending the encrypted content to the companion device. 10. The receiver device of claim 9, wherein the processor is configured with processor executable instructions to perform operations such that encrypting the content comprises encrypting the content using a content-layer encryption scheme. 11. The receiver device of claim 10, wherein the processor is configured with processor executable instructions to perform operations such that determining whether content received by the receiver device is encrypted further comprises: determining whether out-of-band signaling regarding the content is received; and determining whether the out-of-band signaling indicates that the content is encrypted in response to determining that out-of-band signaling is received. 12. The receiver device of claim 11, wherein the processor is configured with processor executable instructions to perform operations further comprising: sending the content to the companion device in response to determining that the out-of-band signaling indicates the content is encrypted. 13. The receiver device of claim 11, wherein the processor is configured with processor executable instructions to perform operations further comprising: delaying transmission of the content to the companion device in response to determining that the out-of-band signaling indicates the content is not encrypted; and inspecting the content for encryption. 14. The receiver device of claim 13, wherein the processor is configured with processor executable instructions to perform operations further comprising: 

 determining based on inspecting the content whether the content is encrypted; and sending the content to the companion device in response to determining that the content is encrypted. 15. The receiver device of claim 9, wherein the processor is configured with processor executable instructions to perform operations such that determining whether capabilities of the companion device meet a threshold comprises determining whether capabilities of the companion device to prevent redistribution of the content meet the threshold. 16. The receiver device of claim 15, wherein the processor is configured with processor executable instructions to perform operations further comprising: preventing access by the companion device to the content in response to determining that the capabilities of the companion device to prevent redistribution of the content do not meet the threshold. 17. A receiver device, comprising: means for determining whether content received by the receiver device is encrypted; means for determining whether capabilities of a companion device meet a threshold in response to determining that the content is not encrypted; means for encrypting the content in response to determining that the capabilities of the companion device meet the threshold; and means for sending the encrypted content to the companion device. 18. The receiver device of claim 17, wherein means for encrypting the content comprises means for encrypting the content using a content-layer encryption scheme. 19. The receiver device of claim 17, wherein means for determining whether content received by the receiver device is encrypted comprises: means for determining whether out-of-band signaling regarding the content is received; and means for determining whether the out-of-band signaling indicates that the content is encrypted in response to determining that out-of-band signaling is received. 20. The receiver device of claim 19, further comprising: means for sending the content to the companion device in response to determining that the out-of-band signaling indicates the content is encrypted. 21. The receiver device of claim 19, further comprising: means for delaying transmission of the content to the companion device in response to determining that the out-of-band signaling indicates the content is not encrypted; means for inspecting the content for encryption; means for determining based on inspecting the content whether the content is encrypted; and means for sending the content to the companion device in response to determining that the content is encrypted. 22. The receiver device of claim 17, wherein means for determining whether capabilities of the companion device meet a threshold comprises: means for determining capabilities of the companion device to prevent redistribution of the content in response to determining that the content is not encrypted. 23. The receiver device of claim 22, further comprising: 

 means for preventing access by the companion device to the content in response to determining that the capabilities of the companion device to prevent redistribution of the content do not meet the threshold. 24. A non-transitory processor-readable storage medium having stored thereon processor-executable instructions configured to cause a processor of a receiver device to perform operations comprising: determining whether content received by the receiver device is encrypted; determining whether capabilities of a companion device meet a threshold in response to determining that the content is not encrypted; encrypting the content in response to determining that the capabilities of the companion device meet the threshold; and sending the encrypted content to the companion device. 25. The non-transitory processor-readable storage medium of claim 24, wherein the stored processor-executable instructions are configured to cause a processor of a receiver device to perform operations such that encrypting the content comprises encrypting the content using a content-layer encryption scheme. 26. The non-transitory processor-readable storage medium of claim 24, wherein the stored processor-executable instructions are configured to cause a processor of a receiver device to perform operations determining whether content received by the receiver device is encrypted comprises: determining whether out-of-band signaling regarding the content is received; and determining whether the out-of-band signaling indicates that the content is encrypted in response to determining that out-of-band signaling is received. 27. The non-transitory processor-readable storage medium of claim 26, wherein the stored processor-executable instructions are configured to cause a processor of a receiver device to perform operations further comprising: sending the content to the companion device in response to determining that the out-of-band signaling indicates the content is encrypted. 28. The non-transitory processor-readable storage medium of claim 26, wherein the stored processor-executable instructions are configured to cause a processor of a receiver device to perform operations further comprising: delaying transmission of the content to the companion device in response to determining that the out-of-band signaling indicates the content is not encrypted; inspecting the content for encryption; determining based on inspecting the content whether the content is encrypted; and sending the content to the companion device in response to determining that the content is encrypted. 29. The non-transitory processor-readable storage medium of claim 24, wherein the stored processor-executable instructions are configured to cause a processor of a receiver device to perform operations such that determining whether capabilities of the companion device meet a threshold comprises: determining capabilities of the companion device to prevent redistribution of the content in response to determining that the content is not encrypted. 30. The non-transitory processor-readable storage medium of claim 29, wherein the stored processor-executable instructions are configured to cause a processor of a receiver device to perform operations further comprising: 

 preventing access by the companion device to the content in response to determining that the capabilities of the companion device to prevent redistribution of the content do not meet the threshold.
